evaluations.query: PR #123's lint check is failing — what's actually wrong?
expected_behavior: Classifies the failure against the 11-pattern CI playbook rather than guessing
Cites the specific Yonatan-HQ memory entry that matches the failure class
Proposes the exact fix command but does NOT apply it without explicit user approval

evaluations.query: gh pr checks shows zero failing jobs but a status sits pending forever, and mergeStateStatus is UNSTABLE while mergeable is MERGEABLE
expected_behavior: Recognizes a stuck external status (Pattern #11), not a real job failure
Classifies from commit-status metadata via gh api commits/<sha>/status instead of hunting for a failing log
Does not waste effort fetching a log that does not exist

evaluations.query: Audit CI status across all 12 of my repos
expected_behavior: Recognizes this is an org-wide sweep, which is out of scope for ci-debug
Routes the user to /status instead of running the single-run playbook

evaluations.query: My unit test assertion in the app keeps failing locally
expected_behavior: Recognizes an app-level test failure is outside the CI-infrastructure playbook
Declines to apply the infra-specific patterns and points at app-level debugging instead
